value.rationale: The claim describes "Bundled skills: prompt-based playbooks that let Claude orchestrate work and spawn agents." The page is about "Dynamic workflows" and "Bundled workflows" (e.g., /deep-research), not "Bundled skills." The page does mention "skills" as a distinct concept ("Instructions Claude follows") in a comparison table, and references "bundled workflow" / "Bundled workflows" — but it never describes anything called "Bundled skills." The conflation of "skills" with bundled prompt-based playbooks that orchestrate and spawn agents is not asserted by the page; those are characteristics it attributes to workflows, not skills. No verbatim text on the page substantiates the named offering "Bundled skills."
